arts.ttl: Why Man Utd should have appointed Kieran McKenna instead of Ruben Amorim as boss
arts.sum: Manchester United spoke to former coach Kieran McKenna back in May when they were considering replacements for Erik ten hag - and now they look lost under Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Revealed: Premier League table since Ruben Amorim took the Man United job - and it's worrying reading for Red Devils fans
arts.sum: Though his side have safely negotiated the early rounds of both the FA Cup and Europa League, it is the Premier League that has been proving a more difficult frontier to conquer.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag aims subtle dig at Manchester United players in first interview since sacking
arts.sum: The former Manchester United head coach has spoken at length about his time at the club in an exclusive interview

arts.ttl: Man Utd favourites to sign transfer listed Serie A superstar
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in signing Serie A superstar Theo Hernandez, who is expected to leave AC Milan at the end of the season. Theo is one of Milan and Serie A's biggest names but he is very likely to leave the Rossoneri at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s ONE big reason to believe Amorim will get it right
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu is the only player to have joined the Red Devils since he took over in November, and there is little doubt that the Lecce man, who was picked up for €30 million, has looked the part. That will mean signing numerous new players given the particular way in which Amorim plays.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag names the one thing he misses at Man Utd and it's not the players
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag spent more than two years as Manchester United manager but the former Ajax boss has yet to return to management following his sacking in October 2024

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sent Antony on loan after he 'took the mick' out of his Man Utd team-mates
arts.sum: Antony has struggled to make an impact at Manchester United since his £85million move from Ajax, but a former coach has revealed the depth of the winger's talent

arts.ttl: Manchester United early team news hints dropped as Ruben Amorim faces Alejandro Garnacho decision
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the side are back in Premier League action on Wednesday night as they host relegation-threatened Ipswich Town at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'Cristiano Ronaldo made his Man Utd debut in place of me - what he did was different'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo made his Manchester United debut against Bolton Wanderers in August 2003 and club icon Nicky Butt has revealed what surprised him most about the star

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Erik ten Hag in agreement on alarming admission about Man Utd stars
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has failed to turn around Manchester United's dismal form since the former Sporting CP boss took over as head coach after Erik ten Hag's autumn sacking
